description: CompositionPink t-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra-elastane, has a bateau neck, short raglan sleeves, pink, brown and gold rubber print with shimmer, brand logo in graphic print on the left hem, and tag with brand name and shimmer on the right hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 40 degreesDo not tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on print/ trims/ logoUpdate your look with ease by slipping into this chic pink tee made of a cotton-lycra-elastane blend. The top with a stylish rubber print enhances your girlish charm, while the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair this with jeans and sneakers for a fun filled day at the mall. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
